Coddy logo preview

Harness ring mark (dual arcs). Source SVGs: docs/assets/coddy-logo-*.svg. Run npm --prefix external/ui run dev -- --host 127.0.0.1 --port 5173 then open /logo-preview.html.

Dark theme

Mark sizes

16px
18px rail
32px
48px
64px

Mark flat (wordmark cube, no halo)

32px
64px

Same Co glyph as wordmark: no drop shadow, no arc blur filter.

Mark icon (full bleed, no border)

32px
64px
128px

Square full-bleed plate for app icons and favicons. No rim stroke, no corner radius.

Nav rail (mark + type)

Coddy agent

Wordmark

Light theme

Mark sizes (no plate)

16px
18px
32px
48px
64px

Rings only, violet gradient stroke on transparent.

Nav rail (mark + type)

Coddy agent

Wordmark

Files
coddy-logo-mark.svg - dark plate + rings (halo)
coddy-logo-mark-flat.svg - dark plate + Co, no halo
coddy-logo-mark-icon.svg - square full bleed, no border
coddy-logo-mark-icon-2048.png - 2048 raster export
coddy-logo-social.svg - GitHub social preview 1280×640
coddy-logo-social-1280x640.png - social preview raster
coddy-logo-wordmark.svg - dark wordmark
coddy-logo-mark-light.svg - light rings only
coddy-logo-wordmark-light.svg - light wordmark
